## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync to discuss content performance, technical SEO improvements, and upcoming content strategy for Attention\<\>GrowthX collaboration.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is strong: 832 clicks for GrowthX articles (50% of blog section clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/3V_aX8Y2DU72J1zhA3fx9thPTNqygsVA?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements implemented: core web vitals issue resolved](https://fathom.video/share/3V_aX8Y2DU72J1zhA3fx9thPTNqygsVA?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [New content initiatives: FAQs addition (30 complete, 10 in progress), podcast repurposing, new topic batch coming Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3V_aX8Y2DU72J1zhA3fx9thPTNqygsVA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
